# MDE v1.5.16

## Features

- Added the Automation Center runtime foundation with workspace automation-flow discovery, flow editing, projection, scheduler/runtime lifecycle, persisted run state, runtime ownership coordination, evidence/report storage, and Agent CLI capability checks.
- Added an editor Agent Chat panel backed by Codex app-server sessions. The panel supports Codex availability gating, streaming send/stop lifecycle, native session listing and resume, current document context, safe image attachments, changed-file summaries, diagnostics, and Codex-only entry visibility.
- Added the private `@mde/automation-flow` and `@mde/agent-chat` workspace packages for automation-flow parsing/projection and Agent Chat runtime/session behavior.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed real Codex app-server initialization so Agent Chat sends the JSON-RPC `initialize` request and `initialized` notification before business methods such as `thread/start` and `thread/list`.
- Fixed Agent Chat entry visibility on machines where Codex protocol type generation is slow enough to exceed the previous readiness timing.
- Fixed duplicate pasted image chips and stale selected-session previews in the Agent Chat panel.
- Hardened Agent Chat diagnostics so renderer-facing errors use generic localized text instead of raw host details.
- Fixed successful Agent Chat sends that could still show a generic diagnostic when changed-file capture was unavailable.
- Fixed Agent Chat composer feedback so submitted messages clear immediately, show a thinking state while the turn is running, and do not keep stale attachment chips after submit.
- Fixed Agent Chat session labels so native Codex session titles and first-message draft titles appear in the picker instead of id-only labels.
- Aligned the Agent Chat panel with the shared chat prototype: the panel now docks as an editor-right workspace column outside `editor.pane`, uses the prototype session header, scroll body, avatar message rows, bottom composer, and composer-owned context details.
- Merged the Agent Chat Send and Stop actions into one primary message-box button, and moved the image attachment button and primary action inside the message box.
- Added an Agent Chat resize handle between the editor and chat panel so the right-side panel width can be adjusted with drag or keyboard controls.
- Fixed Agent Chat workspace switching so a remounted chat panel releases old runtime subscriptions and cannot receive stale events from a previous workspace.
- Fixed Agent Chat context isolation during workspace switches so stale document context cannot be sent into the next workspace, and availability checks no longer reuse a previous workspace result.
- Fixed Agent Chat send failure recovery so the submitted draft and image attachments are restored when the native send request fails.
- Fixed Agent Chat stop handling during session startup by disabling Stop until a native session exists and queuing Codex interrupts until the active turn id is available.
- Fixed nested Git workspace changed-file summaries so Git path discovery stays scoped to the opened workspace subtree.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for Automation Center runtime/window behavior and Agent Chat IPC, preload, renderer, package, Codex adapter, context, attachments, history, changed-files, right-column resize behavior, prototype-aligned layout, and component-id contracts.
- Added package-local lint, typecheck, and test coverage for `@mde/automation-flow` and `@mde/agent-chat`.
- Bounded Agent Chat changed-file snapshot capture with workspace-scoped git changed-path discovery, fallback file-count caps, heavy-directory ignores, and batched metadata snapshots.
- Sanitized renderer-bound Agent Chat availability, diagnostics, and changed-file summary IPC payloads so raw diagnostic details do not cross into the renderer.
- Updated workspace version metadata to `1.5.16`.

## Documentation

- Added Chinese user manual coverage for Automation Center.
- Updated the Chinese AI manual, troubleshooting guide, manual index, and component-name reference for Agent Chat, send-state behavior, session titles, right-column resize behavior, and its stable component ids.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow test`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat test`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat lint`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:e2e:agent-chat`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow. Without optional signing/notarization secrets, these artifacts are unsigned.
- Windows NSIS artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow when the Windows release job is enabled.
